title: Update test_gitutils_worktree_exclude.py for removed chore commit behavior
description: Update tests/test_gitutils_worktree_exclude.py to remove or revise assertions that depended on the old chore commit behavior: any test in MergeMainIntoBranchSaveRestoreTests or other test classes that asserts a 'chore: untrack bead state' commit was created, checks that git rm --cached was called, or assumes bead state files are untracked after worktree creation. Preserve all tests that verify save/restore behavior (orthogonal to this change) and any tests that verify _write_worktree_exclude still runs.
acceptance_criteria: No test in tests/test_gitutils_worktree_exclude.py asserts a chore commit was generated after worktree creation
No test asserts git rm --cached was called inside _protect_worktree_bead_state
uv run pytest tests/test_gitutils_worktree_exclude.py -q passes with no failures
